title: Source Account Cost Analysis
description: Deep cost analysis for the source account: per-service cost drivers (why spend is high), Reserved Instance / Savings Plans commitment coverage, and a trailing month-over-month trend (including the current in-progress, uninvoiced month). Produced by the cost-analysis skill. Distinct from cost-summary.json (single-month snapshot) and cost-baseline.json (planner source-vs-target delta).

available.description: False when Cost Explorer is disabled or ce:GetCostAndUsage is denied.

cost_drivers.description: Top services by net cost with the underlying usage-type drivers and a plain-English explanation of why the spend is high.

share_pct.description: Share of the month's total net cost.

usage_type.description: Cost Explorer USAGE_TYPE, e.g. USW1-BoxUsage:m5.large, USW1-NatGateway-Hours, DataTransfer-Out-Bytes.

description.description: Human gloss of the usage type.

on_demand_pct.description: Portion of this service's eligible compute on on-demand (no RI/SP).

recommendations.description: Levers to reduce it (RI/SP purchase, rightsizing, idle cleanup, data-transfer redesign).

commitments.description: Reserved Instance and Savings Plans coverage/utilization for the analyzed month. Low coverage on steady compute is the most common reason on-demand spend is high.

current_month_to_date_accrued.description: Current in-progress month's accrued (uninvoiced) net cost; AWS bills monthly in arrears. Reported separately from history (partial month).

mom_change_pct.description: Month-over-month change vs the prior row; null for the first month.
